forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to recover your password
forgotPassword.successMessage: If the email exists in our database, you will receive instructions to reset your password.

resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password was reset successfully. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.errorDescription: The link is invalid or has expired

verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email has been verified successfully!
verifyEmail.redirecting: You will be redirected to login in 3 seconds...
verifyEmail.errorDescription: The verification link is invalid or has expired.
verifyEmail.tryResend: You can request a new link from your profile.
verifyEmail.noToken: No verification token found in the link.
